title: MANGA NGE Amazoncom has volume 9
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] Amazon.com has volume 9?             Quote Post by Chimera » Tue Feb 15, 2005 7:41 pm [url]http://www.amazon.com/exec/obidos/tg/detail/-/1591167078/qid=1108512328/sr=1-1/ref=sr_1_1/102-9504745-5280154?v=glance&s=books[/url] I found that on amazon.com's website. But something seems fishy about it: 1. The original price of all Eva manga is $9.95. amazon lists it as $9.99 2. No picture, even when everything else on the site has one. 3. in the title of the page it has the "fifth child" when Kaworu is the fourth Weird or normal? Is it the real 9th vol.?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Feb 15, 2005 7:46 pm Kaworu isn't the fourth child, Touji is. Still, it's probably best not to order it from Amazon if they can't even muster a picture.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Wed Feb 16, 2005 7:23 am I say that as well except it said the issue was out of print---not sure what the hell is going on...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Feb 16, 2005 8:41 am May I suggest RightStuf for purchasing Volume 9 online? For one thing, I know people who have bought it through RightStuf have actually gotten it. http://www.rightstuf.com/cgi-bin/catalogmgr/w0X5Pe4HwB7gHpGfwp/browse/item/64158/4/0/0

[]:             Quote Post by Shwiggie » Wed Feb 16, 2005 1:33 pm Hey, that's where I got it...they came through without a hitch.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Feb 16, 2005 4:22 pm I got mine(along with Der Mond actually) from Barnes and Nobles without any problems a couple months ago.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Wed Feb 16, 2005 5:30 pm Hunter21 wrote: I got mine(along with Der Mond actually) from Barnes and Nobles without any problems a couple months ago.

[]:             Quote Post by Prons » Thu Jun 09, 2005 1:13 am I'd really like to see vol 9, I still need 2-8 though.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jun 09, 2005 12:49 pm amazon.co.uk finally got vol#9 in a few weeks ago, so I now have a copy now.
